deploy.startCommand: if [ -f manage.py ]; then python manage.py migrate --noinput && python -m gunicorn gectaro_saas.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --timeout 180 --graceful-timeout 60; else cd backend && python manage.py migrate --noinput && python -m gunicorn gectaro_saas.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT --timeout 180 --graceful-timeout 60; fi
